processes.name: Face Milling
Pocketing (MRR)
processes.formula: (axialEngagement > 0 && radialEngagement > 0 && feedRate > 0 ? (pocketLength * pocketWidth * pocketDepth) / (axialEngagement * radialEngagement * feedRate) : 0)
